summary: No blocking issues found. Note: local `git diff`/test execution was blocked by the read-only sandbox, so I reviewed the equivalent `main...impl/gap-009` repository compare plus the changed files and committed evidence.
contract_items_verified: Compared `main` (`a563fc1`) against HEAD `impl/gap-009` (`c85e5a2`) and read the changed Spark job, tests, manifest, docs, dashboard, progress, and research files.
GAP-009 module path exists: `railway_lakehouse.spark_jobs.coverage`; PySpark imports are deferred so the module can import without the optional Spark extra.
CLI defaults to the real Gold input `output/evidence/inventory-live-2026-06-23/railway_ml.parquet` and writes under `output/evidence/spark/`.

Spark job validates missing input with `FileNotFoundError`, rejects 0-row input with `ValueError`, reads Gold Parquet via Spark, aggregates deterministically by `geo`/`year`, and writes a Spark Parquet output directory plus manifest.
Committed manifest records Spark 4.1.2, Java 21.0.11, input 2968x4, output 2968x5, files written, partitions written, duration, UTC timestamps, and `status: passed`.
GAP-017 dependency contract is satisfied in current project config: `pyspark==4.1.*` and `delta-spark==4.1.*`; S3A is documented as Maven coordinates, not pip dependencies.
Tests exist and are deterministic: unit import/pin guard runs without PySpark; Spark-marked tests build Gold input in `tmp_path`, assert manifest/output files, and cover missing/empty input failures.

Docs/dashboard sync was done: `docs/TASKS.md`, `docs/index.html`, `docs/GAP_REGISTER.md`, `docs/VERIFICATION.md`, `README.md`, `docs/PROGRESS_LOG.md`, `.planning/COURSEWORK_PROGRESS.md`, and the research record were updated.

AGENTS hard rules checked: no raw Bronze/source ingestion changes; numeric processing is deterministic Spark aggregation with no LLM involvement; evidence outputs are under `output/evidence/spark/`; no hardcoded fabricated dataset was introduced.
